description: Fleet-wide infrastructure health overview across all Windows and Linux servers. Shows aggregated CPU, memory, disk metrics, top problem servers, and active alerts.

panels.description: Total number of servers currently reporting metrics across all environments and operating systems.
panels.title: Total Servers

panels.description: Number of Windows servers currently reporting metrics.
panels.title: Windows Servers

panels.description: Number of Linux servers currently reporting metrics.
panels.title: Linux Servers

panels.description: Average CPU utilization across all servers in the fleet. Thresholds: green < 60%, yellow 60-80%, red > 80%.
panels.title: Avg CPU Utilization

panels.description: Average memory utilization across all servers in the fleet. Thresholds: green < 60%, yellow 60-80%, red > 80%.
panels.title: Avg Memory Utilization

panels.description: Number of servers currently exceeding 85% CPU utilization. Any value above zero warrants investigation.
panels.title: High CPU Servers

panels.description: Number of servers with at least one volume below 20% free disk space. Any value above zero warrants investigation.
panels.title: Low Disk Servers

panels.description: Average CPU utilization over time, broken down by operating system. Helps identify sustained high CPU periods across the fleet.
panels.title: Fleet CPU Utilization

panels.description: Average memory utilization over time, broken down by operating system. Persistent high values may indicate memory leaks or undersized servers.
panels.title: Fleet Memory Utilization

panels.description: Count of servers actively reporting metrics over time, broken down by operating system. A sudden drop indicates servers going offline or agent failures.
panels.title: Servers Reporting

panels.description: Top 10 servers by CPU utilization across the entire fleet. Sorted descending to highlight the most resource-constrained servers.
panels.title: Top 10 CPU

panels.description: Top 10 servers by memory utilization across the entire fleet. Sorted descending to highlight servers under memory pressure.
panels.title: Top 10 Memory

panels.description: Bottom 10 servers by free disk space. Shows the most disk-constrained volumes across the fleet. A low value indicates imminent disk exhaustion.
panels.title: Top 10 Lowest Disk

panels.description: Count of currently firing alerts across the entire fleet. Zero is the expected healthy state.
panels.title: Active Alerts

panels.description: Details of all currently firing alerts. Shows alert name, affected hostname, severity, and description to enable rapid triage.
panels.title: Firing Alerts

panels.description: Real-time reachability status for every monitored server. Value of 1 means the server is up and responding; 0 means Prometheus cannot reach the target.
panels.title: Server Up/Down

panels.description: Fleet-wide average CPU utilization projected 7 days forward based on 7-day historical trend. Helps identify whether the fleet is approaching capacity limits.
panels.title: Fleet CPU Utilization -- 7-Day Forecast

panels.description: Fleet-wide average memory utilization projected 7 days forward based on 7-day historical trend.
panels.title: Fleet Memory Utilization -- 7-Day Forecast

panels.description: Servers with disk volumes projected to fill within the next 30 days based on 7-day growth trend. Sorted by urgency (fewest days remaining first).

targets.expr:
(
  -1 * predict_linear(windows_logical_disk_free_bytes{environment=~"$environment", datacenter=~"$datacenter", volume!~"HarddiskVolume.*"}[7d], 1) / (windows_logical_disk_free_bytes > 0) * 86400
) < 90
or
(
  -1 * predict_linear(node_filesystem_avail_bytes{environment=~"$environment", datacenter=~"$datacenter", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|squashfs", mountpoint!~"/boot.*"}[7d], 1) / (node_filesystem_avail_bytes > 0) * 86400
) < 90

panels.title: Fleet Disk Capacity Forecast (Days Until Full, <90d Only)

list.description: Filter by deployment environment (e.g. production, staging, development).
list.label: Environment
list.name: environment

list.description: Filter by datacenter or site location.
list.label: Datacenter
list.name: datacenter

title: Infrastructure Overview
